button.name: action_liberar_parcela
button.confirm: ¿Confirma la liberación de esta parcela? El contrato asociado quedará sin parcela asignada.

button.name: action_sale_booking
button.invisible: stage not in ['booked'] or not sold_booking_id

div.class: o_horizontal_separator mt-4 mb-3 text-uppercase fw-bolder small

div.h4: Please enter a valid Video URL.

t.t: Huge file size. The image should be optimized/reduced.
Optimization required! Reduce the image size or increase your compression settings.
Huge file size. The image should be optimized/reduced.
Optimization required! Reduce the image size or increase your compression settings.

div.t:
Sale Details
Sale Price:
Foreign Price:

div.t-attf-style: 'background-color: %s' % ((record.stage.raw_value == 'available' and '#28a745') or (record.stage.raw_value == 'booked' and '#ffc107') or (record.stage.raw_value == 'sale' and '#17a2b8') or (record.stage.raw_value == 'sold' and '#007bff') or (record.stage.raw_value == 'occupied' and '#dc3545') or '#6c757d')

field.name: help
field.p: Las parcelas se agrupan por jardín (y fase). El color de la cinta superior indica el estado: verde (disponible), amarillo (reservada), azul claro (en venta), azul (vendida), rojo (ocupada).
